name: confetti
title: Confetti
description: A celebratory confetti burst — pieces launch from an origin, fan outward, arc under gravity, tumble, and fade. Every per-piece value is seeded, so the same seed renders identically every time. Full-canvas layer; energetic but tasteful.
pickWhen: a literal celebration — milestone hit, signup confirmation, launch reveal. Once per piece, not per scene; it cashes the moment in.
